entity.summary: Blockchain platform ecosystem with centralized exchange references, a peer-to-peer decentralized exchange, wallets, escrow, and related digital-asset services.
entity.notes: The Counos Exchange candidate is represented under the broader Counos parent because the first-party platform exposes exchange and DEX services alongside other blockchain products. The site states that the platform surfaced in 2017.

evidence.title: Counos official blockchain platform
evidence.notes: First-party site presents exchange, decentralized exchange, wallet, escrow, and related services and states a 2017 platform start.

evidence.title: Counos Exchange registry entry
evidence.notes: Registry source identifies the Counos Exchange candidate that is consolidated into the broader parent entity.
